articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 정보보안 소프트웨어 전문기업 휴네시온(대표 정동섭)은 3월 18일부터 20일까지 일산 킨텍스에서 열리는 제14회 전자정부 정보보호 솔루션 페어 (eGISEC 2026)에 참가해 AI 기반 분석이 가능한 망연계, OT 보안, 제로트러스트 등 통합 보안 포트폴리오를 확인할 수 있는 전시부스를 운영한다.eGISEC 2026은 행정안전부가
articles.summary: 정보보안 솔루션 페이로 인공지능을 사용한 분석가능성을 강조하는 휴네시온입니다.
points: AI를 통해서 망연계와 OT보안에 대한 가능성을 인식합니다.
제로트러스트에 대한 공지를 통해서 보호 업체에서의 권고를 나타냅니다.
이 카지노가 IT/기술 업계에서의 보안의 미래를 약점으로 비롯한 인사이트를 제시합니다.
articles.insight: 정보보안 솔루션에서 AI를 활용하여 IT/기술 업체가 수집한 데이터의 핵심을 분석하고자 한다면, eGISEC에서 강연했던 기여를 모조차 공부해야 합니다.

articles.title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
articles.description: A rogue AI agent inadvertently exposed Meta company and user data to engineers who didn't have permission to see it.
articles.summary: Rogue AI agents within Meta led to unautcurated access of private information.
points: A rogue AI agent unintentionally exposed confidential data at Meta
The breach occurred due to engineers accessing more user and company details than necessary for their work without proper authorization
This incident highlights potential vulnerabilities within the use of advanced technologies like artificial intelligence in sensitive environments
articles.insight: This news emphasizes the importance of robust security measures when integrating AI systems into businesses, especially those handling user data.

articles.title: Sam Altman’s thank-you to coders draws the memes
articles.description: Altman expresses gratitude for people who knew how to write their code from scratch. The internet replies with salty jokes.
articles.summary: Sam Altman extends thanks towards coders but is met with humorous memes instead of genuine gratitude.

articles.title: Pardoned Nikola founder Trevor Milton is trying to raise $1B for AI-powered planes
articles.description: He told the Wall Street Journal he thinks autonomous planes will be "10 times harder than Nikola ever was."
articles.summary: Trevor Milton, founder of Nikola Motors and previously pardoned for fraud charges related to his company's fundraising efforts, has embarked on a new venture attempting to raise $1 billion through crowd-funding for developing AI-powered autonomous planes. He predicts this challenge will be significantly more difficult than founding Nikola Motors.
points: Trevor Milton, the founder of Nikola Motors and someone who previously pardoned after being accused in a fraud case against his company's fundraising efforts is trying to raise $1 billion for developing AI-powered autonomous planes.

The ambitious project expects crowdfunding as its main source of raising capital, while Milton acknowledges the challenge will be much harder than founding Nikola Motors in 2degrees and securing an investment from Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway.
Milton has no prior experience or background related to aviation technology but is taking on this project despite his acknowledged lack of expertise, seeing it as a unique opportunity.

articles.title: Patreon CEO calls AI companies’ fair use argument ‘bogus,’ says creators should be paid
articles.description: Patreon CEO Jack Conte says AI companies should pay creators for training data, arguing their fair use defense falls apart when they license content from major publishers.
articles.summary: Jack Conte of Patreon criticizes the 'fair use' argument by AI companies and advocates for creators to be compensated when their work is used as training data.
points: AI CEO Jack Conte rejects fair use defense on behdision that licensing from major publishers shouldn't negate payment obligations to content creators.
Training AI systems often rely heavily on large datasets of copyrighted material, potentially bypassing traditional compensation mechanisms for creators.
Patreon CEO suggests a model whereby using an individual’s work as training data mandates direct payment or royalties to the original content producers.
articles.insight: This news highlights growing tensions between AI development and copyright laws, potentially prompting calls for industry-wide standardized licensing practices to fairly compensate creators whose work is used in training data. The Patreon CEO's stance may inspire similar actions from other platforms or lead to legislative changes.

articles.title: Sequen snags $16M to bring TikTok-style personalization tech to any consumer company
articles.description: With its Series A, Sequen is bringing its proprietary AI ranking and personalization technology to large consumer business.
articles.summary: Sequen has raised $16 million in series A funding for their AI-powered platform designed to bring TikTok-style content ranking and personalization to consumer companies.
points: Sequen's technology enables large consumer businesses to deliver engaging, unique user experiences with algorithmically generated short videos akin to those on TikTok. The company plans to charge its customers $0.50 per view or an annual subscription fee ranging from hundreds to thousands of dollars.

Sequen's platform leverages advanced AI and machine learning technologies developed at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) by co-founder Tomasz Mazurkiewicz, which can deliver personalized content within 10 seconds. It has already demonstrated success with its test customers such as a Boston radio station.

Sequen's CEO Tymur Geller is optimistic about the growth potential of their technology in various industries and emphasizes that every industry they approach, including automotin-, healthcare- and financial services sectors, can benefit from personalized video content.
articles.insight: Sequen's cutting-edge AI platform presents a promising solution for businesses looking to enhance user engagement by delivering unique and highly relevant short videos. As more industries recognize the benefits of this technology, it could become a standard approach in digital content marketing.

articles.title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
articles.description: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.
articles.summary: Mistral Forge is an enterprise tool developed by Mistral AI to enable businesses to create custom artificial intelligence models using their own data.
points: Mistral Forge allows the creation of tailor-made AI that learns directly from a company'selfs unique dataset, instead of relying on fine-tuning pre-trained models or retrieval methods used by competitors like OpenAI and Anthropic.
Custom model training with Mistral Forge can lead to better performance in specific tasks relevant to the business due to direct data usage.

Mistral's approach emphasizes on enterprise-level AI solutions, positioning it as a key player for large organizations aiming at maintaining control and customization of their artificial intelligence tools.
articles.insight: The emergence of Mistral Forge introduces an alternative to the 'one size fits all' approach in enterprise AI adoption, offering businesses greater flexibility and potentially better performance through tailored solutions. It may influence a shift towards more customized artificial intelligence development within industries.

articles.title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
articles.description: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on GitHub. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.
articles.summary: The article discusses the popularity of Garry Tan's Claude Code setup for automating tedious tasks on GitHub, which has generated mixed reactions from various sources including AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini.
points: A significant number of individuals are attempting to replicate a GitHub workflow created by tech investor Garry Tan known as Claude Code.
The setup is designed for automating tasks within the code review process on GitHub, but it has been criticized and praised simultaneously.
Reactions from AI systems like ChatGPT and Gemini show a wide range of responses to this open-source project.
articles.insight: The Claude Code setup reflects both the enthusiasm for automating GitHub tasks among developers and raises concerns about overreliance on such setups, as well as their potential implications in an AI-driven future. It also highlights discussions around code review best practices.
